query: SELECT userId, COUNT(*) as token_count FROM pushTokens GROUP BY userId ORDER BY token_count DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4JQihNFt71oUk4Z.root --database DZLsNMXz8tKivpZtpPajU7 --execute SELECT userId, COUNT(*) as token_count FROM pushTokens GROUP BY userId ORDER BY token_count DESC;
